footer.tagline: Transforming land decisions through data intelligence. We provide actionable insights for sustainable development.

home.title: AI-Powered Land Analysis
home.subtitle: Real-Time Satellite Intelligence
home.hero_title: Unlock the Potential of Global Land Data
home.hero_desc: Empower your investment decisions with the world's most advanced land intelligence platform. Real-time data, AI valuations, and predictive analytics at your fingertips.
home.features_title: Everything you need to make better decisions
home.features_desc: Our platform combines traditional land data with satellite imagery and AI to give you a complete picture.

features.global_coverage_desc: Access comprehensive land data from over 150 countries with unified standardization.
features.advanced_analytics_desc: Leverage AI-driven insights to predict market trends and land value fluctuations.
features.secure_transactions_desc: Blockchain-backed verification ensures complete transparency and security in every deal.
features.real_time_desc: Get instant notifications on zoning changes, environmental factors, and market shifts.

home.cta_section_title: Ready to transform your land strategy?
home.cta_section_desc: Join over 500+ enterprises using SCOPLIT to manage their global asset portfolios.

platform.title: Platform Technology
platform.hero_desc: Our platform leverages cutting-edge AI and satellite imagery to provide real-time land intelligence.
platform.stack_desc: Designed for speed, accuracy, and reliability.

tech.ingestion_desc: Automated pipelines processing terabytes of satellite and ground data daily.
tech.ai_desc: Proprietary machine learning models for land classification and valuation.
tech.infra_desc: Cloud-native architecture ensuring 99.99% uptime and low-latency access.
tech.security_desc: SOC2 compliant with end-to-end encryption for all sensitive data.

about.title: About SCOPLIT
about.hero_title: We're mapping the future of global land intelligence
about.hero_desc: SCOPLIT was founded with a single mission: to provide transparency and actionable insights for land investments worldwide.
about.mission_desc: To democratize access to high-quality land data, enabling sustainable development and smarter investment decisions across borders.
about.vision_desc: A world where every piece of land is understood, valued correctly, and utilized for its best purpose through data-driven insights.
about.team_desc: Our team combines decades of experience in real estate, data science, and satellite technology.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.hero_desc: Have questions about our data coverage or API integration? Our team is ready to help.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.hero_desc: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. No hidden fees.

plans.starter_desc: Perfect for small teams and regional analysis.
plans.custom_desc: Tailored solutions for government and research.

resources.title: Resources
resources.hero_desc: Stay ahead of the market with our latest research, guides, and industry news.
